conbody.p: Use this guide to learn how to install Juniper Cloud-Native Router (JCNR), including installing the Juniper Cloud-Native Router Controller (cRPD), the Juniper Cloud-Native Router container network interface (JCNR-CNI), and the high-performant vRouter in a Kubernetes cluster. The Cloud-Native Router controller integrates with JCNR-vRouter to provide the rich forwarding capabilities of a Junos OS router, enabling high-performance forwarding and throughput on a Linux host. Additionally, JCNR-CNI provides networking for the vRouter and the Cloud-Native Router controller pods.
